## 🐛 Bug Description

> A clear and concise description of the bug.

<!-- Example: "When running a for-in loop over an empty array, the interpreter crashes with a KeyError." -->

---

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce

1. Create a `.cherry` file with the following content:
   ```cherry
   // paste your code here
   ```
2. Run: `cherryscript your_file.cherry`
3. Observe the error

## 🖥️ Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| CherryScript version | `cherryscript --version` output |
| Python version | `python --version` output |
| Operating System | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / macOS 14 / Windows 11 |
| Install method | `pip install -e .` / `pip install cherryscript` |

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I can reproduce this bug consistently
- [ ] I have provided a minimal reproduction case
